_meta.description: Thematic cluster definitions. Each cluster groups related entities for navigation and retrieval.

foundations.label: ML Foundations
foundations.description: Core ML concepts that apply across all biological domains.

classical-ml.label: Classical ML Methods
classical-ml.description: Pre-deep-learning algorithms taught in the course: EM, HMMs, k-means, dynamic programming.

deep-learning.label: Deep Learning
deep-learning.description: Neural network architectures, training procedures, and optimization.

generative-models.label: Generative Models
generative-models.description: Models that learn to generate new data: VAEs, diffusion, flows, RL.

genomics.label: Genomics
genomics.description: Gene expression, bulk and single-cell transcriptomics.

sequence-analysis.label: Sequence Analysis
sequence-analysis.description: Alignment, motif finding, and database search.

epigenomics.label: Epigenomics
epigenomics.description: Chromatin state, histone modifications, DNA methylation, ATAC-seq, ChIP-seq.

regulatory-genomics.label: Regulatory Genomics
regulatory-genomics.description: Transcription factors, enhancers, promoters, gene regulatory networks.

protein.label: Protein Structure and Function
protein.description: Protein structure prediction, folding, language models, design.

genomics-ml.label: Genomic Language Models
genomics-ml.description: Transformer-based models trained on DNA/RNA sequences.

drug-discovery.label: Drug Discovery and Chemistry
drug-discovery.description: Molecular representations, GNNs for chemistry, drug generation, ADMET.

genetics-disease.label: Genetics and Disease
genetics-disease.description: GWAS, SNPs, polygenic risk scores, eQTLs, heritability, disease circuitry.

course-meta.label: Course Structure
course-meta.description: Course modules, instructors, and overall computational biology framing.
